instruction: Brand: Nike | Format: TV Ad 60 sec | Industry: Sports | Theme: Cricket Street to Stadium | Tone: Inspiring

response.Content:
[0:00 - 0:05]
Visual: Extreme close-up of a worn-out tennis ball hitting a puddle in a Mumbai gully. Slow-motion splash.
Audio: Heavy breathing. Distant city honking fades into a rhythmic heartbeat.
Dialogue: (Voiceover) "Inga start aana..." (It starts here...)

[0:05 - 0:15]
Visual: Quick cuts—A boy bowling in the rain. A girl hitting a six over a vegetable cart. Dust rising. Sweat dripping.
Audio: The heartbeat syncs with a 'Thavil' drum beat. Growing louder.
Dialogue: "...Gully kaura, Stadium-a maarum." (The gully noise turns into a stadium roar)

[0:15 - 0:25]
Visual: Transition match cut—The boy's worn sneaker transforms into a gleaming Nike spike shoe landing on a professional turf.
Audio: Silence. Then—CRACK of the bat. Deafening crowd cheer erupts.
Dialogue: "Verum kanavu illa. Idhu veri." (It's not just a dream. It's obsession.)

[0:25 - 0:30]
Visual: The girl, now an India team player, looks at the camera. Intense stare. She sprints.
Audio: Bass drop. High energy hip-hop track begins.
Dialogue: "Just Do It."

[End Specification]
Visual: Nike Swoosh on a cricket pitch.
Dialogue: "Nike. Greatness comes from the streets."

instruction: Brand: Royal Enfield | Format: TV Ad 45 sec | Industry: Automobile | Theme: Himalayas | Tone: Rugged

response.Campaign: Royal Enfield - Soul of the Mountains
response.Content:
[0:00 - 0:10]
Visual: Wide drone shot of the Spiti Valley. Barren, majestic mountains. A single speck moves on the winding road.
Audio: Wind howling. The distinct 'Thump-Thump-Thump' of the Enfield engine cuts through.
Dialogue: (Inner Monologue) "Pahad bulate hain... par sirf unhe jo sun sakte hain." (The mountains call... but only to those who listen.)

[0:10 - 0:20]
Visual: Close-up on the rider's gloved hand accelerating. Mud splashes on the visor. Crossing a freezing river stream.
Audio: Splash sound. Engine revs harder. Guitar riff (Western styles) kicks in.
Dialogue: "Yahan koi cellular network nahi. Sirf connection hai... khud se."

[0:20 - 0:30]
Visual: The bike halts at a prayer flag post. Rider takes off helmet. It's a woman. She breathes in the cold air.
Audio: Music mellows down. Prayer flags fluttering sound.
Dialogue: "Made like a gun. Goes like a bullet."

[0:30 - 0:35]
Visual: She kicks the starter. The thump returns. Fade to black.
Audio: Thump... Thump... Thump...
Dialogue: "Royal Enfield. Leh, Ladakh, Life."

instruction: Brand: Surf Excel | Format: TV Ad 45 sec | Industry: FMCG | Theme: Daag Acche Hain | Tone: Emotional

response.Content:
[0:00 - 0:10]
Visual: A pristine white school uniform. A little boy sees a puppy stuck in a muddy ditch.
Audio: Soft piano melody. Whimpering sounds of the puppy.
Dialogue: (Boy to Friend) "Are ruk, woh darr gaya hai."

[0:10 - 0:20]
Visual: Without hesitation, the boy slides into the ditch. Mud splatters all over his white shirt. He lifts the puppy out.
Audio: Uplifting orchestral swell.
Dialogue: (Puppy barks happily). (Boy laughs) "Chal, bhaag ab!"

[0:20 - 0:30]
Visual: Boy returns to his mother, covered in mud. Mother looks stern, then sees the puppy wagging its tail nearby.
Audio: Music pauses. Silence.
Dialogue: "Mamma... woh..."

[0:30 - 0:40]
Visual: Mother smiles and wipes mud off his cheek.
Audio: Surf Excel signature jingle tune.
Dialogue: (Mother) "Agar kuch achha karne mein daag lagte hain... toh daag achhe hain."

[End Specification]
Visual: Product shot against white background.
Dialogue: "Surf Excel. Daag Acche Hain."

instruction: Brand: Paper Boat | Format: Social Media Reel | Industry: Beverage | Theme: Nostalgia | Tone: Warm

response.Content:
[0:00 - 0:05]
Visual: Split screen. Left: 1998 (Grainy filter), Kids pushing a tyre with a stick. Right: 2025 (HD), Guy in a suit stuck in traffic.
Audio: Left: Street noise, laughter. Right: AC hum, horns.
Dialogue: "Yaad hai woh race? Jahan finish line nahi, bas masti thi."

[0:05 - 0:12]
Visual: The guy in the car opens a pack of Paper Boat Aamras. He takes a sip. His eyes close.
Audio: Sound of a suction pop. Glug... glug...
Dialogue: (Internal) "Swaad wahi..."

[0:12 - 0:15]
Visual: Flashback. He is a kid again, juice dripping down his chin, smiling with mango in hand.
Audio: Sound of a cycle bell 'Trin Trin'.
Dialogue: "...yaadein nai."

[End Specification]
Visual: Paper Boat pack with a paper boat animation floating nearby.
Dialogue: "Paper Boat. Drinks and Memories."

instruction: Brand: Tanishq | Format: TV Ad 40 sec | Industry: Jewellery | Theme: Modern Wedding | Tone: Progressive

response.Content:
[0:00 - 0:10]
Visual: A beautiful Tamil wedding mandap logic. The bride is sitting. Her father is hesitant to perform the 'Kanyadaan' (giving away).
Audio: Traditional Nadaswaram, but played slowly. Emotional silence.
Dialogue: (Father) "Naan epdi unna 'daan' panna mudiyum? Nee en ponnu."

[0:10 - 0:20]
Visual: The bride holds her father's hand. She looks confident.
Audio: Soft violin entry.
Dialogue: (Bride) "Appa, neenga enna kudukkavenaam. Just aashirvad pannunga."

[0:20 - 0:30]
Visual: The groom smiles and holds out his hand, not to take her, but to hold hers. They walk around the fire together.
Audio: Music turns celebratory and grand.
Dialogue: (Narrator) "Traditions change. Love remains."

[End Specification]
Visual: Tanishq Rivah Logo.
Dialogue: "Tanishq Rivah. For the modern bride."

instruction: Brand: Manyavar | Format: TV Ad 30 sec | Industry: Fashion | Theme: Diwali | Tone: Celebratory

response.Content:
[0:00 - 0:05]
Visual: A guy in a t-shirt and jeans looks out at the lit-up city from his balcony. He feels out of place.
Audio: Distant crackers. Muted celebration.
Dialogue: "Diwali aa gayi... par feel nahi aa rahi."

[0:05 - 0:15]
Visual: His friend throws a maroon silk kurta at him. He catches it. Cut to: Him walking out wearing it, looking dapper.
Audio: Swoosh sound. Ethic drum beats kick in instantly.
Dialogue: "Kapde badlo. Mahual apne aap badal jayega."

[0:15 - 0:25]
Visual: He enters the living room. Elders smile. He touches feet (blessings). Transition to him dancing with sparklers.
Audio: Full festive track—Upbeat Bollywood + Dhol.
Dialogue: "Taiyaar hokar aaiye. Tyohaar banakar jaiye."

[End Specification]
Visual: Manyavar Logo.
Dialogue: "Manyavar. Pehno Apni Pehchan."
